title: Released guidance is complete in Japanese, Simplified Chinese, and English
purpose: Require three-language text and speech while preserving one exact Japanese sign target and allowing UI and voice languages to differ.

limitations: The guidance wording is illustrative and is not sign evidence for a released movement.

sign_target.exact_text_ja: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

ja-JP.display_text: 左側を進み、B 湾岸線・横浜方面へ
ja-JP.spoken_text: 左側を進み、B 湾岸線、横浜方面へ
ja-JP.preserved_sign_text_ja: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

zh-Hans.display_text: 保持左侧，跟随 B 湾岸线・横滨方向
zh-Hans.spoken_text: 保持左侧，跟随 B 湾岸线，横滨方向
zh-Hans.preserved_sign_text_ja: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

en.display_text: Keep left for Route B, Bayshore Route, toward Yokohama
en.spoken_text: Keep left for Route B, Bayshore Route, toward Yokohama
en.preserved_sign_text_ja: B 湾岸線・横浜方面

then.subject: localization.release_gate
then.rationale: Every required locale has display text, spoken text, reviewed forms, and the preserved sign target.

then.subject: guidance.visible_sign_text_ja
then.expected: B 湾岸線・横浜方面
then.rationale: All localized experiences must point to the same physical Japanese sign.

then.subject: localization.active_ui_locale
then.rationale: The user selected Simplified Chinese for the interface.

then.subject: guidance.active_voice_locale
then.rationale: English voice may be selected without changing the Chinese interface.

then.subject: guidance.used_implicit_wrong_language_voice
then.rationale: A missing matching voice must be disclosed before driving, not hidden by an unrelated pronunciation.
